markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review client status, production metrics, and the Check That rollout strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**CRV Client is a "yellow" risk** due to unresponsiveness, delaying Phase 2. The plan is a 1-on-1 meeting to unblock progress.](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
  - [**Production capacity is critically low,** with only 5 of 83 slots open. This is driven by custom accounts consuming 3-5x capacity and experienced staff being pulled to the Sprint team.](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=1981.0)
  - [**The Check That rollout is stalled** by team confusion over pricing and process. A clear playbook is required to prevent giving away a $1,500/mo product for free.](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=2220.0)
  - [**Kirkland's team needs immediate hiring support.** Daniel is considering temporarily reassigning staff (e.g., Leo, Pedro) from the Check That team to provide short-term relief.](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=3373.0)

## Topics

### Client Health & Status

  - [**CRV (Yellow):** Unresponsive, delaying Phase 2.](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
      - [**Plan:** Secure a 1-on-1 meeting to unblock.](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
      - [**Context:** A senior marketing head, not a junior contact.](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
  - [**BlackSoul (Green):** Converting to Phase 2.](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)
      - [**Context:** Ada's direct communication with the client confirmed the conversion, resolving a prior lack of response.](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
  - [**Navon, Recs, Turnstile (Green):** Verbally confirmed.](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [**TelOne:** Requested H1 traffic projections.](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
      - [**Plan:** William will use the existing model (keywords → content volume → domain authority) to provide a forecast by EOD.](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [**Webstacks:** Performance is strong, but client responsiveness is a persistent issue.](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
      - [**Context:** The CEO is busy and has not empowered the introduced contacts to provide feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)

### Production Capacity & Efficiency

  - [**Production Metrics:**](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=1192.0)
      - [**Weekly Output:** \~397 pieces of content.](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=1211.0)
      - [**Time to Delivery:** 1h 4m (up from 51m), but within variance.](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=1192.0)
  - [**Capacity Analysis:**](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=1755.0)
      - [**Status:** 78 of 83 total slots are filled, indicating a critical shortage.](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=1755.0)
      - [**Drivers:**](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=1981.0)
          - [**Custom Accounts:** Consume 3-5x capacity (e.g., Webflow, DataGrid).](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=1704.0)
          - [**Sprint Team:** Pulls experienced staff from production (e.g., Natalie, Victor).](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=1981.0)
          - [**Special Projects:** Divert resources (e.g., Saskia).](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=2095.0)
  - [**Efficiency Analysis:**](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=1277.0)
      - [**Tool:** A new tool tracks time-to-delivery per client and employee to identify bottlenecks.](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=1277.0)
      - [**Findings:**](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)
          - [**High-Efficiency:** Clients like Lovable (18m/piece).](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)
          - [**Low-Efficiency:** Clients like Rimkus (high time) due to complex requirements and internal stakeholder issues, not just editor performance.](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=1352.0)
      - [**Action:** Use data to coach editors, optimize processes, and file tickets for automation.](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=1370.0)

### Check That Rollout Strategy

  - [**Problem:** Team confusion over the rollout process and pricing is causing inconsistent client communication.](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=2220.0)
  - [**Marcel's Stated Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=2367.0)
      - [**90-Day Trial:** All clients get a free trial of the Business tier.](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=2367.0)
      - [**Post-Trial Options:**](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=2367.0)
          - [**Business Tier:** $1,500/mo, requiring a contract amendment.](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=2674.0)
          - [**Pro Tier:** $2.50/mo, self-serve with a credit card.](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=2608.0)
          - [**Free Tier:** Limited features.](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=2608.0)
  - [**Proposed Solution:** A clear, scenario-based playbook.](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=2531.0)
      - [**Strategy:** Position Check That as a value-add for at-risk (red) accounts to aid retention, but as an incremental revenue opportunity for healthy accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=2719.0)
      - [**Process:** The 90-day trial provides a buffer to create the playbook and the enterprise MSA.](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=2835.0)
      - [**Ownership:** EMs will manage the post-trial conversation.](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=2857.0)

### Team & Hiring Needs

  - [**Kirkland's Team:** Needs immediate hiring support.](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=3342.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The team is stretched, and Content OS will not immediately eliminate the need for more people.](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=3304.0)
      - [**Status:** Hiring requests were previously denied.](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=3373.0)
      - [**New Development:** Daniel is now considering temporarily reassigning staff (e.g., Leo, Pedro) from the Check That team post-launch.](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=3389.0)
  - [**DM Training:** A new "show-and-tell" office hours format will teach DMs to proactively analyze account performance.](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**William:**](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
      - [Secure a 1-on-1 meeting with CRV to unblock progress.](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
      - [Provide H1 traffic projections to TelOne by EOD.](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
      - [Contact French and German-speaking contacts for the Spendesk account.](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=2054.0)
  - [**Andy & Golden Gate:**](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=3133.0)
      - [Draft a scenario-based playbook for the Check That rollout.](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=3133.0)
  - [**Golden Gate:**](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=3133.0)
      - [Align with Tyler on the Check That rollout process for Sprint clients.](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=3133.0)
  - [**Bridget, Golden Gate, & Ella:**](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=2174.0)
      - [Meet next week to align on capacity forecasting and hiring needs.](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=2174.0)
  - [**Kirkland:**](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=3373.0)
      - [Discuss temporary staffing support with Daniel.](https://fathom.video/share/LUnXKhvSwh8LERxVivFsg1wxu288KGUV?tab=summary&timestamp=3389.0)
